title: The Living Stone
description: Determine all potions that the target ingredient can certainly produce when mixed with at least one partner.

hints.text: Find all potions that ingredient 3 can certainly produce. Neutral is always certain — every alchemical has a direct opposite, and mixing them always yields neutral. For the other potions, a result is 'certain' when it's the same across every remaining possible world.
Check each of ingredient 3's 7 partners for non-neutral certain results. Non-neutral certain results: ing1→B+.
Ingredient 3 = pnP. Certain potions (neutral always included): ['B+', 'neutral'].
